description: SDXL 1.0 + Pokémon Trainer Sprite LoRA — pixel-art trainer sprite style (96×96)
_comment: LoRA by sWizad. Trained on Pokémon trainer sprites upscaled from 96x96; load weight: pk_trainer_xl_v1.safetensors.
_comment_trigger: No trigger word needed. Optional style tags: 'gen1' (Game Boy palette) or 'gen2' (GBC palette).
_comment_background: Add 'simple background' or 'white background' to keep focus on the character sprite.
_comment_trainers: Model recognises some trainer names: Ash, Bruno, and others from the games.
_comment_steps: 30 steps per official example code. More steps increase detail but slow generation.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7.5 per official diffusers example. Range 5–9 works.
_comment_size: 768x768 is the recommended output size per the model card (the 768 version).
_comment_downscale: For authentic sprites: downscale the 768x768 output by 8x to 96x96 in any image editor.
